name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Carrollton, TX — PLS Check Cashers at 1900 E Belt Line Rd offers 24/7 check cashing services for local residents.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week at 1900 E Belt Line Rd in Carrollton, TX. This standalone location serves the Carrollton community with convenient access for anyone needing quick check cashing services without an appointment.

The Carrollton location provides standard check cashing, including personal checks, payroll checks, and government checks. For more information about services or to confirm availability, customers can reach the location at +1 972-417-1100.

If you're a Carrollton resident needing to cash a check, bring a valid photo ID and your check to this 24/7 location on E Belt Line Rd. PLS Check Cashers handles typical cashing requests quickly, making it a reliable option for off-hours financial needs in the area.
address: 1900 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006

company_info.headquarters: 1900 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006

pros: 24/7 operating hours across all service categories including check cashing, money orders, bill pay, and government benefits
Multi-service locations combining check cashing, vehicle registration, notary services, and financial products in one stop
Ria Money Transfer partnership enabling domestic and international wire transfers at check cashing locations
Prepaid debit card (Xpectations PLUS Mastercard) with mobile app for account management and direct deposit capability
Government benefits card services for Social Security and other benefit payments
Document services including notary, fax, and copy available 24/7 alongside financial services
12-state operational footprint providing geographic convenience across major U.S. markets
cons: No fee transparency on website—check cashing, money order, and bill payment fees require in-person inquiry
Limited online service capability; primarily transaction-based requiring physical store visits
Foreign exchange services mentioned but no rates, limits, or details provided on website
Prepaid debit card carries typical fees associated with branded prepaid products (not disclosed on site)
No indication of alternative verification methods for customers without ID or documentation
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need check cashing and money transfer services outside banking hours
Gig workers and contract employees requiring quick check cashing and bill payment services
Customers needing bundled financial and government services in single locations
International money transfer users seeking accessible wire transfer access via Ria partnership
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for consumers without traditional bank accounts who need 24/7 check cashing, money transfer, and financial services across multiple states. The primary caveat is that all service fees are undisclosed on the website—customers must visit locations in person to understand true costs, and competitive shopping between locations is necessary to evaluate value.
services: Ria Money Transfer (domestic and international wire transfers)
Xpectations PLUS Debit Mastercard prepaid cards
Fax, copy, and postage stamp services
meta_description: Carrollton, TX check cashing at PLS Check Cashers, 1900 E Belt Line Rd. Open 24/7 for fast check cashing services.
